name: Spinach and Artichoke Casserole
recipeIngredient: 30 ounces frozen chopped spinach, thawed and drained
recipeInstructions:
1. If using frozen artichokes, cook according to package instructions. Do not overcook.
2. Drain the artichokes and place them at the bottom of a 3-quart casserole dish.
3. Squeeze as much moisture as possible from the spinach, then layer it on top of the artichokes.
4. In an electric mixer, blend the cream cheese, mayonnaise, and olive oil until light and fluffy.
5. Gradually beat in the milk, mixing well.
6. Spread the mixture over the top of the spinach.
7. Sprinkle with pepper and Parmesan cheese.
8. Bake, uncovered, at 375°F for 40 minutes, or until the top is lightly browned. If refrigerated before baking, slightly increase the baking time.
